## Results and Discussion

<div style="display: flex; gap: 1em;">
<div style="flex: 2;">

![](images/rlhf-results.png)

</div>
<div style="flex: 1;">
This approach works varyingly well. Occasionally better *or* worse than idealized reward. 
</div>
</div>

**Assumptions and Sources of Failure**

1. Assumes humans respond approximately optimally.
2. Assumes annotators provide homogeneous preferences.
3. Assumes preferences are made consistently over the whole learning process.
